mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT d.* FROM document d LEFT JOIN document_access da ON da.document_id = d.id AND da.user_id = #{userId} WHERE d.status = 'active' AND (d.user_id = #{userId} OR da.user_id IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT d.* FROM document d LEFT JOIN document_access da ON da.document_id = d.id AND da.user_id = #{userId} WHERE d.status = 'active' AND (d.user_id = #{userId} OR da.user_id IS NOT NULL)
AND (d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND d.category = #{category}
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
